title: I bought my first perfume in my life.
description: I fell in love with the scent of hand cream that my sister gave me by chance, and I wanted this scent to come from me, not only my hands. I decided...

children.value:
I fell in love with the scent of hand cream that my sister gave me by chance, and I wanted this scent to come from me, not only my hands.
So, when I searched, I sold perfume, and I applied right away because I could get
free blotter of six signature products

I decided in my mind that I should buy only one topknot cream until I receive the blotter.
However, when I smelled it, I changed my mind to buy two types because I thought it would feel stuffy in the middle of summer, maybe because of the creamy scent.
I don't know much about perfume, so I'm going to organize it lightly and decide to buy it based on this.

When I smelled it as a blotter, I felt it was a creamy and sweet woody scent and suede scent, so I felt it was a warm scent that felt heavy overall.
However, when I sprayed it on the flesh after purchasing it, it was a little different from when I smelled it as a blotter.
At first, it smelled clean and sweet, and as it went back, it smelled creamy, adding to the weight.
I heard that there is also a fig scent, but I can't express it because I don't know the fig scent.
Due to its name, it seems to be compared a lot to

, and this section is said to pass quickly.
Rather, there is an opinion that it is similar to
, so if you have time, it would be better to try it.

I bought it and I'm using it, and I think I bought it really well.
I bought it because I didn't have a choice because I excluded other perfumes from the purchase list, but honestly, when I smelled with blotter, I didn't find it very attractive because it was a bit pungent and heavy.
I used it because I had to go out on a slightly hot day, but when I sprayed it on the flesh, it was very satisfying because it was
cool and light and had an unexpected flower scent

.
It seems that you can feel the scent of roasted sweet potatoes as an aside story.
It is recommended for those who prefer cool flower scents such as
Byredo Rose of No Man's Land

It was the first thought I felt after smelling it.
I was glad that it smelled like vanilla and soft and sweet, similar to the skin I used when I was young, but I excluded it from the purchase list because it was not good enough to use as a perfume in my thought.
If you prefer a clean scent such as
, it will suit your taste, and it is recommended as a common perfume for men and women in their 20s.
Overall, the scent of basil was noticeable and clean and light, but it felt like a
slightly wet grassy scent that felt like grass on a cloudy day

.
I didn't like spicy scents, so I excluded them from the purchase list, but after re-smelling them while writing this, I strangely want to smell them again.
What should I say, it's not a good scent because it's definitely not my taste, but it's so unique that I want to smell it again.

Personally, there are a lot of unfamiliar scents, so I can't express what scent it is.
It's cool and a little pungent, so it
smells like a pain relief patch

.
I don't know if it's because of its name, but it also smells like grass forest at the end of the scent.

This scent is also unfamiliar, so I can't express it well.
It seems similar to Forest, but it feels different, but it's smoky and cool, but it feels a little less pungent.

Personally, it smelled like smoked ham because it smelled a little salty with a smoky smell.
I think it feels especially so when I put the blotter off my hand and smell it.

I organized my thoughts like above and decided to buy Sangtal Cream and Gaiac Flower.
When I searched, there was a non-fiction store in the duty-free shop, so my younger sister bought it for me on her way back from traveling abroad.
I got my first perfume of my life.

props.alt: Santal Cream & Gaiac Flower given as a gift

title: Starting unit test with JUnit 5 Part 1
description: I've been aware of the importance of testing code for a long time, but I've been delaying them, saying that I'll learn later because I can finish m...

children.value:
I've been aware of the importance of testing code for a long time, but I've been delaying them, saying that I'll learn later because I can finish my work faster if I write a code during the time I study for the testing code.
However, whenever the requirements were added little by little, I suddenly felt ashamed of myself for testing them in a fist style.
Therefore, I am going to write a series to
In this article, I will summarize the information that must be known, but can proceed with the test properly.

A unit test is a procedure in computer programming to verify that certain modules of source code work exactly as intended.
That is, it refers to the procedure of writing a test case for all functions and methods.
Detect bug: The functionality is tested in small pieces, so you can quickly check where the problem occurred.
Refactoring: ensures better accuracy and stability in refectoring because it makes the code small and simple.
Documentation: Because there are libraries that use unit tests to document APIs, documentation and maintenance become convenient.
Ensuring results: because the method is isolated and simulated, the results of the unit test do not always represent the results of the system as a whole.
Development and Maintenance Costs: Test codes also need to be developed and maintained, increasing the scope to be managed.
Unlike the previous JUnit, JUnit 5 consists of JUnit Platform + JUnit Jupiter + JUnit Vintage.
: It is responsible for executing the test framework on the JVM. It also provides a test engine API to facilitate integration with JUnit.
: It provides a test engine for Jupiter subprojects such as JUnit 5.
: It provides a test engine for running JUnit 3 and JUnit 4 based tests.
Since it is frequently used, I am going to organize the annotations that I basically need to know.
: Indicates that the method is a
: Indicates that this is a method that must be
: Indicates that this is a method that must be
are called life cycle methods because they run according to the life cycle of the test.

This is because JUnit runs the tests in an unpredictable order, as unit tests should not normally depend on order.
However, sometimes the order of testing may be important.
In this case, annotate your test class or test interface with

The assertion method does not execute subsequent code because an exception occurs when the test fails.
However, there may be cases where you want to run all assertion methods regardless of failure.
In that case, if you use this method to group the assertion methods, they do not cause an exception, so even
if they fail, they do not stop immediately and aggregate the errors
But, if an exception (e.g., Out of Memory) is generated in the blacklist, the execution is immediately stopped and overwritten with an unchecked exception.

JUnit creates a new test instance for each test method to minimize the impact between tests.
However, you may not want to create a new test instance every time as needed.
In this case, you can annotate the class

to change the test instance creation pattern according to the mode you specify.
The selectable modes are

:
It is the default value and is characterized by
because it creates a new instance for each method.

:
It is possible to share the status in the method because each class creates a new instance.
do not necessarily have to be declared in the
Why do we need to understand the life cycle of a test instance
If we don't know the life cycle of the test instance, we write the code on the premise that we can share the state because we think in

mode.
Therefore, the following cases may occur.
